name: Quantum Cyber N.V.
business: The company develops and sells in-vitro diagnostic tests for early cancer detection, historically including ColoAlert for colorectal cancer and currently focusing on a blood-based pancreatic cancer detection product candidate. In February 2026, the board decided to wind down the colorectal cancer product lines and expand into post-quantum cybersecurity. The company sold its ColoAlert intellectual property in March 2026 and is actively marketing the next-generation colorectal cancer screening intellectual property for sale.

exposures.sentence: Throughout our 2025 fiscal year, our legacy ColoAlert product was marketed and sold in European markets.
We are developing a product candidate for pancreatic cancer detection.

These changes were made to align our strategy to expand our business focus in the area of post-quantum cybersecurity, while continuing to pursue the commercialization of our blood-based pancreatic cancer detection product candidate.

catalysts.event: Board decision to wind down colorectal cancer product lines
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, our board of directors decided to wind down our ColoAlert product and the development of our next generation colorectal cancer screening product candidates, and to terminate the employment of those persons who were primarily dedicated to those ends.

catalysts.event: Appointment of David Lazar as director and co-CEO
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, we appointed David Lazar to our board of directors, and in March 2026, we announced the appointment of Robert Liscouski as our non-executive Chairman, with David Lazar assuming the position of director and co-CEO.

On March 28, 2026, we sold the intellectual property behind ColoAlert, and we are actively marketing for sale the intellectual property behind our next generation colorectal cancer screening product candidates.

catalysts.event: Extraordinary shareholders meeting for conversion approval and name change
catalysts.sentence: We intend to hold an extraordinary shareholders meeting ( Shareholders Meeting ) on April 22, 2026.

catalysts.event: License fee installment deadline for Liquid Biosciences agreement
catalysts.sentence: The Company is paying the license fee in installments through May 1, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Over 460,000 cases of pancreatic cancer were diagnosed worldwide in 2018.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Global Cancer Observatory, over 460,000 cases of pancreatic cancer were diagnosed worldwide in 2018.

tamClaims.claim: Over 430,000 annual deaths from pancreatic cancer worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: Due to its asymptomatic early stages, this disease is often detected too late, making pancreatic cancer one of the most lethal malignancies, with over 430,000 annual deaths reported by the Global Cancer Observatory.

tamClaims.claim: In the United States, 62,210 new cases and 49,830 deaths from pancreatic cancer in 2018.
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, the SEER program estimated 62,210 new cases and 49,830 deaths from pancreatic cancer in the same year.
